reasoning: VIX at 20.22 (MID regime) rising +8.48% overnight — clear bearish signal as fear builds. No extreme spike yet (threshold >22), but directional momentum is decidedly lower. Sector rotation confirms: XLK tech -1.35% leading weakness while XLF +0.83% and XLE +1.25% (defensives/cyclicals) outperform — textbook risk-off. Overnight gap flat (-$0.46, neutral). Zero macro events today → clean tape for 09:30 open. Ribbon still BULL (fast 689.08 > pivot 688.94 > slow 688.55) with 53¢ spread, but SPY price 688.86 sits below fast EMA — uptrend integrity fading. Overall: bearish bias from VIX + rotation, clean setup window, but MID regime (not HIGH) and technical uptrend still standing prevent extreme confidence.
key_observations: VIX surged +8.48% overnight to 20.22 (from ~18.65); rising fear is the dominant signal — higher puts more expensive but directional bearish edge clear
Sector rotation firmly risk-off: XLK tech -1.35% as growth weakens, XLE +1.25% + XLF +0.83% as defensives/energy lead — classic flight-to-safety pattern
Ribbon BULL but showing strain: fast EMA 689.08 > price 688.86 — uptrend support weakening, pullback setup forming
Overnight gap -$0.46 (flat) — no overnight panic, no gap-fill urgency; yesterday's -0.57% decline is mild carryover
Clean macro calendar (zero events, zero earnings pre-market) = no hard windows; bearish setups can run without event interference
